title: Daylight provision — Atlanta IBC §1010
kicker: Why this opening, here, at this size

reasoning.text: Atlanta 2026 IBC §1010 requires 10 sq ft glazing per 200 sq ft floor area for habitable rooms (≥ 5% ratio).
Captured opening: ~8.4 sq ft. Floor area at this room: ~198 sq ft. Ratio: 4.2%.
Below requirement by 1.6 sq ft of glazing. Either re-spec the window, add a transom, or file for a §1009.4 variance.

title: FAR — 0.7 of 0.8 used
kicker: How much more this parcel can hold

reasoning.text: Parcel zoned MR-3 in the Atlanta DPCD map. FAR cap: 0.8.
Current build at this stage of construction: 0.7 FAR (incl. this addition).
0.1 FAR remaining ≈ ~3,200 sq ft for future expansion or vertical add.
Site is within 0.5 mi of MARTA rail (qualifies for Transit-Oriented Development overlay).
TOD overlay permits +0.3 FAR bonus + reduces parking minimum to 0.5/unit.
If pursued: unlocks ~9,600 additional sq ft on this parcel.

title: Load-bearing wall — restricts future floorplan

reasoning.text: Wall identified as primary load-bearing — continuous from foundation, no beam visible above.
Removal in renovation requires LVL header + posts. Estimated structural scope: $8–12k.
Constrains tenant flexibility. Worth flagging in marketing materials as 'fixed' before lease commitments.

citations: Visual structural inference — verify with licensed PE before action

reasoning.text: Tract median income $58k. 22% age 65+. 14% below poverty.
Affordability + accessibility matter — affects mix-of-uses pro forma.
